summary_en: 1,155,000 shares (2.33% of shares outstanding) up to ¥2,951.0M. ToSTNeT-3 on May 15, 2026, 8:45 am JST. Price ceiling ¥2,555/share (May 14 close). Same-day settlement.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Topre Corporation's board approved on May 14, 2026 the acquisition of treasury stock via off-hours trading (ToSTNeT-3). The company will place a buy order on May 15, 2026 at 8:45 am JST using the closing price from May 14 (¥2,555/share) as the ceiling. The transaction will acquire up to 1,155,000 shares, representing 2.33% of shares outstanding, for a maximum total of ¥2,951,025,000. The buy order is valid for that trading session only and will settle same-day; results will be announced immediately after trading closes. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and enable flexible capital policy execution in response to changing business conditions.
